title: ZXBrick Levels
description: Learn the structure and goals of ZXBrick's handcrafted level progression, including how each stage unlocks new challenges and reinforces repeatable skill patterns.
summary: ZXBrick includes 100 handcrafted levels and uses a repeatable progression loop across all difficulty states.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: ZXBrick confirms 100 handcrafted levels in its marketing and app metadata.
The level loop should be treated as your primary replay structure for short and medium sessions.

sections.heading: Approach level progression
paragraphs: Use a fixed target count for each session rather than jumping levels every run.
Focus on consistency first and progress through the same level pattern before extending duration.

featureShowcases.heading: Level progression
featureShowcases.summary: Levels explain how ZXBrick builds challenge as players clear stages and keep the run moving.
body: This matters because level structure gives brick-breaking sessions a sense of pace and escalation.
Players use this page to understand how levels fit with power-ups, score chasing, and practical strategy.
bullets: Connects levels to power-ups and tips.
Uses current ZXBrick level artwork as the visual placeholder.

image.caption: Level artwork supports the ZXBrick progression explanation.
